about.title: About Portal CPC
about.subtitle: Learn about our mission and the values that drive us.
about.missionText: To facilitate the socio-professional integration of migrants in the Algarve, creating sustainable bridges between talent and opportunity.
about.missionQuote: CPC was born from the need to create bridges between migrants and the Portuguese labor market, offering a complete path of training, support and integration.
about.platformP1: We propose creating a digital platform that will facilitate the integration process for these individuals at every stage, from training and cultural preparation to personalised support in key areas, and socio-professional and community insertion. We adopt a holistic, integrated approach with continuous, proximity-based support, believing these are fundamental pillars for successful integration in host communities. We expect wide-ranging impacts not only within the migrant community itself, but also in society as a whole, which plays a vital role in this group's integration and benefits from it through social cohesion and development.
about.platformP2: Over the project's three years we aim to reach a total of 100 migrants, and we will work in the Algarve region, an area with a growing migrant flow, making the most of our network.

inclusion.title: Inclusion
inclusion.description: We believe everyone deserves equal opportunities.

empathy.title: Empathy
empathy.description: We treat every person with respect and consideration.

cooperation.title: Cooperation
cooperation.description: We work together to achieve common goals.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We build lasting and impactful solutions.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A structured path to your success.

step1.title: Registration & Initial Situation
step1.description: Account creation with an initial questionnaire to assess needs. This gathers information on legal status, housing, existing skills and interests, as well as warning signs or urgent situations to be addressed.

step2.title: Profile & actions
step2.description: The system builds a needs profile and suggests first steps.

step3.title: Scheduling
step3.description: Booking sessions with the technical team (lawyer, psychologist).

step4.title: Training
step4.description: Access to learning paths with suitable recommendations.

howItWorks.companyLead: The CPC portal works both ways:
howItWorks.companyBullet1: the candidate builds their profile, CV and searches for opportunities
howItWorks.companyBullet2: the employer posts their vacancies and finds talent
howItWorks.companyMatch: The system itself matches the most suitable profiles to the openings.
howItWorks.ctaSubtitle: Register for free and start your integration journey today.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help with any questions.

form.name: Name
form.sentSubtitle: We will get in touch soon.

faqs.a: Yes, all CPC services are completely free for migrants.

faqs.q: Do I need documents to register?
faqs.a: No documents are required to create an account. Documentation will be requested as needed during the process.

faqs.q: In what languages can I receive support?
faqs.a: We offer support in Portuguese, English, and other languages through cultural mediators.

helpCenter.noResults: No articles found for your search.

cta.title: Still need help?
cta.subtitle: Our support team is available to answer your questions in real time. Choose your preferred channel.

comingSoon.title: We are building something new for you
comingSoon.subtitle: This feature is under development to ensure the best socio-professional integration experience

hero.title: Uniting Talent
hero.subtitle: A platform for socio-professional integration, connecting migrants with technical teams and visionary companies ready to grow together. Project developed for migrants in the Algarve region.

process.title: How Portal CPC works
process.subtitle: We simplify the journey, for both talent and organizations, across three fundamental pillars of success.

step1.title: Specialized Support
step1.description: Information and guidance on culture, legal framework, health system and documentation, for clear integration without uncertainty.

step2.title: Personalized Support
step2.description: Dedicated mentors guide you through legal frameworks, cultural integration, and career planning stages.

step3.title: Professional Integration
step3.description: Direct connection to a network of partner companies seeking diverse talent to enrich their teams.

features.title: More than just a job portal
features.description: Portal CPC was born from the conviction that diversity drives innovation. We are building a bridge where human potential meets opportunity, regardless of origin.

footer.tagline: Connecting People and Companies through meaningful opportunities and sustainable integration.
footer.socialInclusionIntro: Through the support of Portugal Inovação Social, CPC seeks to tackle the social exclusion of migrants in Portugal by creating a digital platform that will support their integration process in three stages:
footer.socialInclusionPhases: Cultural readiness and training – personalised support – socio-professional and community integration.
footer.socialInclusionClosing: Together with migrants themselves, we want to build their path towards inclusion through a holistic approach and ongoing, close support.
footer.supportLogosAlt: Portugal Inovação Social, Algarve 2030, Portugal 2030, European Union

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.p1: This Cookie Policy explains how the CPC Platform uses cookies and similar technologies when users access the website or use the digital services provided through the platform.
intro.p2: This policy is drafted in accordance with:
list: Directive 2002/58/EC (ePrivacy Directive) on privacy and electronic communications
applicable national legislation on data protection.
intro.p3: By using the CPC Platform, users may consent to the use of certain cookies as described in this policy.

what.title: 2. What are cookies
what.p1: Cookies are small text files stored on the user’s device (computer, tablet, or smartphone) when visiting a website or using a digital platform.
what.p2: These files allow the system to recognize the user’s device and remember certain information about their use of the platform, such as preferences, active session, or browsing settings.
what.p3: Cookies can be classified according to:

types.title: 3. Types of cookies used by the CPC Platform
types.p1: The CPC Platform uses the following categories of cookies:

necessary.title: 3.1 Strictly Necessary Cookies
necessary.p1: These cookies are essential for the platform to operate and cannot be disabled in the platform’s systems. They allow, for example:
list: authentication and session management after login
access to restricted areas of the platform
management of appointments and platform services
necessary.p2: Without these cookies, some essential platform features may not be available.
necessary.baseLegal: Legal basis: Article 6(1)(f) GDPR – legitimate interest, related to the technical operation of the service requested by the user.

analytics.title: 3.2 Performance and Analytics Cookies
analytics.p1: These cookies collect information about how users use the platform. The information collected may include:
analytics.p2: These data are used exclusively for statistical purposes and to improve the platform’s operation and user experience. Whenever possible, these data are processed in an anonymized or aggregated form.

personalization.title: 3.3 Personalization Cookies
personalization.p1: These cookies allow remembering user preferences and adapting the platform user experience. They may be used to:
list: adapt content to the user profile

thirdParty.title: 3.4 Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.p1: Some CPC Platform features may integrate services provided by third parties, such as:
thirdParty.p2: These services may install their own cookies on the user’s device. The CPC Platform does not directly control how these cookies are used by third parties. Users are encouraged to consult the privacy policies of those entities.

duration.title: 4. Cookie duration
duration.p1: Cookies used on the CPC Platform may have different durations:
duration.sessionBody: They are temporary and remain active only during the browsing session. They are automatically deleted when the user closes the browser.
duration.persistentBody: They remain stored on the user’s device for a defined period or until they are manually deleted.

consent.title: 5. Consent management
consent.p1: Under the GDPR and the ePrivacy Directive, cookies that are not strictly necessary will only be used after the user’s explicit consent.
consent.p2: When accessing the CPC Platform for the first time, the user may:
consent.p3: The user can change preferences at any time through the cookie settings available on the platform.

manage.title: 6. How to manage or disable cookies
manage.p1: Users can control or delete cookies through their web browser settings. Most browsers allow you to:
manage.p2: Disabling some cookies may affect the proper functioning of the platform.
manage.p3Prefix: Additional information about managing cookies can be found at:

dataProtection.title: 7. Personal data protection
dataProtection.p1: Whenever cookies may involve processing personal data, such processing will be carried out in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the CPC Platform Privacy Policy.
dataProtection.p2: Data collected through cookies will not be used to directly identify users, except when necessary for the operation of the requested service.

rights.title: 8. User rights
rights.p1: Under the GDPR, users have the right to:
list: restrict the processing of their data
rights.p2: The exercise of these rights can be requested through the contacts indicated in the platform’s Privacy Policy.

changes.title: 9. Changes to the Cookie Policy
changes.p1: The CPC Platform may update this Cookie Policy whenever necessary to reflect legal, technical, or operational changes. Whenever relevant changes are made, users will be informed through the platform.

contacts.title: 10. Contacts
contacts.p1: For any questions related to this Cookie Policy or the processing of personal data, users can contact:

intro.title: 1. Introdução
intro.p1: A proteção dos dados pessoais é uma prioridade para a Plataforma CPC. Esta Política de Privacidade explica como recolhemos, utilizamos, armazenamos e protegemos os dados pessoais dos utilizadores da plataforma.
intro.p2: A Plataforma CPC é um sistema digital destinado a apoiar processos de capacitação, integração socioprofissional e ligação ao emprego, incluindo o acesso a conteúdos formativos, agendamento de sessões de apoio técnico e ligação entre migrantes e entidades empregadoras.
intro.p3: Esta política está em conformidade com:
list: Regulamento (UE) 2016/679 — Regulamento Geral sobre a Proteção de Dados (RGPD / GDPR)
legislação nacional aplicável em matéria de proteção de dados
princípios de transparência e responsabilidade no tratamento de dados pessoais.
intro.p4: Ao utilizar a Plataforma CPC, o utilizador aceita as práticas descritas nesta política.

controller.title: 2. Responsável pelo tratamento de dados
controller.p1: O responsável pelo tratamento de dados pessoais é:

purposes.title: 3. Finalidade do tratamento de dados
purposes.p1: Os dados pessoais são recolhidos e tratados para permitir o funcionamento e prestação dos serviços disponibilizados pela Plataforma CPC. As principais finalidades incluem:
accountManagementList: criação e gestão de contas de utilizadores
gestão de perfis (migrantes, equipa CPC e empresas)
screeningList: acompanhamento técnico por mediadores, juristas ou psicólogos
trainingList: registo de progresso em conteúdos educativos
schedulingList: marcação e gestão de sessões de apoio
comunicação entre utilizadores e equipa CPC
jobInsertionList: ligação entre migrantes e entidades empregadoras
communicationList: envio de notificações relacionadas com a conta
comunicação institucional relacionada com o projeto

dataCategories.title: 4. Categorias de dados pessoais recolhidos
dataCategories.p1: Dependendo da utilização da plataforma, podem ser recolhidos diferentes tipos de dados pessoais.
dataCategories.screeningTitle: Dados relacionados com a situação inicial
dataCategories.p2: Sempre que possível, apenas são recolhidos os dados estritamente necessários para a prestação do serviço.

legalBasis.title: 5. Base legal para o tratamento de dados
legalBasis.p1: O tratamento de dados pessoais na Plataforma CPC baseia-se nas seguintes bases legais previstas no RGPD:
list: Execução de um serviço solicitado pelo utilizador (Artigo 6.º, n.º 1, alínea b)
Consentimento do utilizador (Artigo 6.º, n.º 1, alínea a)
Cumprimento de obrigações legais (Artigo 6.º, n.º 1, alínea c)

sharing.title: 6. Partilha de dados
sharing.p1: Os dados pessoais podem ser partilhados apenas quando necessário para a execução das finalidades descritas. Os dados podem ser partilhados com:

team.label: Equipa CPC
team.desc: Mediadores, técnicos, juristas, psicólogos e gestores de caso responsáveis pelo acompanhamento dos utilizadores.

employers.label: Entidades empregadoras
employers.desc: Apenas quando o utilizador decide candidatar-se a oportunidades de emprego.

providers.label: Prestadores de serviços tecnológicos
providers.desc: Fornecedores de infraestrutura digital, alojamento, ferramentas de comunicação ou análise.

sharing.p2: Todos os prestadores de serviços estão sujeitos a acordos de confidencialidade e proteção de dados. Os dados não são vendidos nem utilizados para fins comerciais externos.

internationalTransfers.title: 7. Transferências internacionais de dados
internationalTransfers.p1: Sempre que dados pessoais sejam tratados fora do Espaço Económico Europeu (EEE), serão aplicadas salvaguardas adequadas, conforme previsto no RGPD, incluindo:
list: decisões de adequação da Comissão Europeia
mecanismos equivalentes de proteção de dados.

retention.title: 8. Período de conservação dos dados
retention.p1: Os dados pessoais são conservados apenas pelo período necessário para cumprir as finalidades para as quais foram recolhidos. Em geral:
list: dados de contas de utilizador são mantidos enquanto a conta estiver ativa
dados relacionados com o projeto podem ser mantidos pelo período exigido por normas de auditoria de financiamento europeu
após esse período, os dados serão eliminados ou anonimizados.

security.title: 9. Segurança dos dados
security.p1: A Plataforma CPC implementa medidas técnicas e organizacionais adequadas para proteger os dados pessoais contra:
list2: controlo de acesso por perfil de utilizador

dataSubjectRights.title: 10. Direitos dos titulares dos dados
dataSubjectRights.p1: Nos termos do RGPD, os utilizadores têm os seguintes direitos:
list: direito de acesso aos seus dados pessoais
direito de retificação de dados incorretos
direito ao apagamento dos dados ("direito a ser esquecido")
direito de retirar o consentimento a qualquer momento.
dataSubjectRights.p2: Para exercer estes direitos, o utilizador pode contactar a entidade responsável através dos contactos indicados nesta política.

complaints.title: 11. Reclamações
complaints.p1: Os utilizadores têm o direito de apresentar reclamação junto da autoridade de controlo competente em matéria de proteção de dados. Em Portugal, a autoridade competente é:
complaints.authority: Comissão Nacional de Proteção de Dados (CNPD)

changes.title: 12. Alterações à Política de Privacidade
changes.p1: Esta Política de Privacidade pode ser atualizada periodicamente para refletir alterações legais, técnicas ou operacionais. Sempre que ocorrerem alterações relevantes, os utilizadores serão informados através da plataforma ou por outros meios adequados.

contacts.title: 13. Contactos
contacts.p1: Para qualquer questão relacionada com esta Política de Privacidade ou com o tratamento de dados pessoais, pode contactar:
